name: Grilled Cornish Hens with Rosemary Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 3 Cornish hens, split in half lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the lemon juice, olive oil, rosemary, garlic, salt, pepper, and vinegar.
2. Place the hen halves in a shallow dish and pour half of the mixture over them. Turn to coat.
3. Set aside for 10 minutes.
4. Remove hens from the marinade and place, bone side up, on a rack.
5. Grill or broil 6 inches from a hot fire for 10 minutes per side, turning once and basting with the remaining marinade.
